title: Henbrandt Pack of 24 Pink Party Candles with Candle Holders, Pink Spiral Celebration Candles for Birthday Cakes Baby Showers for Girls and Anniversary Decorations
features: Pack of 24 Light Pink Party Candles with 12 candle holders.
These elegant spiral pink candles are ideal for birthday cakes, baby showers and anniversary celebrations.
One box contains 24 short candles and 12 candle holders, for use 2-3 times.
These candles measure around 6cm in height.
Recommended for ages 14+. These cake candles should be used under adult supervision and children should not be left alone with lit flames.
description: Product description These incredible light pink party candles are perfect for illuminating cakes, with an elegant spiral design ideal for all ages and celebrations, whether a special birthday or baby shower. Each box of pink party candles includes 24 short pink candles and 12 pink candle holders, which can be used between 2 and 3 times. Simply attach the holder to the candle, place on a cake, and light for a truly beautiful display. The pink candles are 6cm in length and perfectly sized to perch on birthday cakes and more. Use these pink party candles responsibly. These cake candles are recommended for ages 14 and above and are not to be used without adult supervision. Single pack of 24 blue party candles per order. The party candles are non-toxic, and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU candle safety requirements. Safety Warning Use these pink party candles responsibly. These cake candles are recommended for ages 14 and above and are not to be used without adult supervision.
